hooks.command:
printf '
========== SESSION ENDING ==========
Before closing, ensure you have:
  1. Updated CHANGELOG.md (use changelog-keeper agent)
  2. Updated docs/status/WHITEBOARD.md if status changed
  3. Archived build folder to TRL tests/ with SUMMARY.md
  4. Pushed all changes (git add -A && git commit && git push)
  5. If new dead end found, updated CLAUDE.md Dead Ends table
=====================================
'
